events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the unbonded pump motor is a **critical, fail-condition hazard** under NEC 680.26(B)(6) — it breaks the required equipotential bonding grid and creates shock/electrocution risk. Immediate control is to de-energize the circuit, install the required 8 AWG bonding conductor to the motor, verify grid continuity, and confirm GFCI protection before allowing any pool use.
